Mexico.tactical_profile: host advantage, experienced midfield, balanced/physical 4-3-3 or 4-2-3-1

South Africa.tactical_profile: compact block, quick transitions, organized under Hugo Broos

South Korea.tactical_profile: pace in transition, strong wide/forward threat, defensive quality through Kim

Czechia.tactical_profile: direct, physical, set-piece danger, resilient mid-block
risk_notes: can struggle if forced to chase

Canada.tactical_profile: speed, vertical transitions, left-sided threat through Davies

Bosnia and Herzegovina.tactical_profile: experienced spine, direct attacks, compact defensive approach

Qatar.tactical_profile: AFC experience, possession phases, counter-attacking threat

Switzerland.tactical_profile: structured, experienced, strong central control, difficult to break down

Brazil.tactical_profile: high individual quality, wide isolation, aggressive attacking transitions

Morocco.tactical_profile: disciplined block, elite full-back transitions, strong tournament identity

risk_notes: depth and defensive level vs top opponents

Scotland.tactical_profile: physical midfield, set pieces, wing-back/full-back delivery

USA.tactical_profile: athletic press, verticality, home energy, flexible 4-3-3/4-2-3-1

Paraguay.tactical_profile: physical defending, transition threat, CONMEBOL intensity

Australia.tactical_profile: organized, aerial/set-piece threat, disciplined tournament approach

Türkiye.tactical_profile: technical midfield, creative profiles, high variance attacking team

Germany.tactical_profile: high pressing, technical possession, chance volume, deep squad

Cote d'Ivoire.tactical_profile: athletic, direct, strong midfield power, transition speed

Ecuador.tactical_profile: defensive solidity, duel strength, compact pressing

Netherlands.tactical_profile: structured build-up, strong back line, wing/full-back width

Japan.tactical_profile: technical speed, pressing, fast combinations, tactical flexibility

Sweden.tactical_profile: strong forward options, direct attacks, physical profile

Belgium.tactical_profile: creative attacking core, winger isolation, experienced attack

Egypt.tactical_profile: Salah-led transitions, compact team shape, counter-attacking threat

Iran.tactical_profile: disciplined block, experienced forwards, direct transitions
risk_notes: pace and game state if trailing

Spain.tactical_profile: possession dominance, pressing, elite technical midfield and wide creativity

Uruguay.tactical_profile: high intensity, athletic midfield, vertical pressure, strong duels

France.tactical_profile: elite transition attack, tournament experience, flexible defensive structure

Senegal.tactical_profile: athletic, balanced, strong transitions, physical defending

Norway.tactical_profile: elite striker threat, creator-forward connection, direct danger

Argentina.tactical_profile: experienced champions, controlled possession, clutch tournament mentality

Algeria.tactical_profile: technical attackers, midfield control, transition threat

Austria.tactical_profile: organized pressing, strong structure, intense midfield work

Jordan.tactical_profile: counter-attack, compact block, AFC knockout pedigree

Portugal.tactical_profile: creative midfield, technical possession, strong attacking options
risk_notes: balance between veteran and younger profiles

Uzbekistan.tactical_profile: solid defensive base, direct transitions, disciplined underdog

Colombia.tactical_profile: wide attacking flair, creative midfield, dangerous transitions

DR Congo.tactical_profile: physical, balanced, European-based talent pool, transition threat

England.tactical_profile: elite attacking depth, set pieces, strong central/wing options

Croatia.tactical_profile: experienced midfield, possession control, tournament know-how

market_research.source: ESPN schedule / DraftKings visible lines where present

operational_use.recommended_next_command: run_chatgpt_research_intake.py --dry-run then --apply-fixture-import if validation passes, then run_emergency_quiniela_fill.py --mode final --write

warnings: Research is pre-tournament; refresh tomorrow morning before final submission if time allows.
Confirmed lineups/formations are unavailable for most future group-stage matches and must not block pre-tournament quiniela generation.
Market data is partial; use visible odds as confidence/risk contrast only, not replacement for Core.

Names may require baseline alias mapping for South Korea/Korea Republic, Czechia/Czech Republic, Bosnia and Herzegovina/Bosnia-Herzegovina, Turkiye/Türkiye/Turkey, Curacao/Curaçao, Ivory Coast/Côte d’Ivoire, and DR Congo/Congo DR.
